svg.text: EXPERIMENTER 1 — TEC-1 memR ADD-ON EXPERIMENTAL DECK
Accurate 250 × 200 mm component-placement deck picture matched to experimenter1.md
20 named jumper terminals exactly as listed in the document
port map, hex table, run notes, experiment
all-pass, digital pot socket, varactor pad,
real cell, limits, clamps, Cu/Al pads
row/column LEDs, LED bar, X/Y scope, piezo,
Note: concept placement, not routed KiCad.
Core signal flow: TEC-1 OUT → latch/DAC/mux → oscillator/phase/memristor/crossbar → summer/envelope/ADC → TEC-1 IN.
Generated from experimenter1.md: zones A-K, port map 10h-17h, named patch points, and functional blocks 9.1-9.9.
